tr.title: Genç ve İman
tr.caption: Gençliğini Rabbinin yolunda geçirenlere ne mutlu. 🤍

en.title: Youth & Faith
en.caption: Blessed are the youth who spend their days on their Lord's path. 🤍

tr.title: Kalbin Sesi
tr.caption: Kalpler ancak Allah'ı anmakla huzur bulur. (Ra'd, 28)

en.title: Voice of the Heart
en.caption: Hearts find rest only in the remembrance of Allah. (Ar-Ra'd, 28)

en.title: Echo of the Soul
en.caption: Be patient; indeed Allah is with the patient. (Al-Baqarah, 153)

tr.title: Hislerle
tr.caption: Dua, müminin silahı ve kalbin nefesidir. 🤲

en.title: With Feeling
en.caption: Supplication is the believer's weapon and the heart's breath. 🤲

tr.title: Huzur Notu
tr.caption: Allah'a tevekkül et; O sana yeter. (Talâk, 3)

en.title: A Note of Peace
en.caption: Put your trust in Allah; He is sufficient for you. (At-Talaq, 3)

en.title: Purity of Soul
en.caption: Successful is the one who purifies the soul. (Ash-Shams, 9)

tr.title: Dua Bahçesi
tr.caption: Rabbim, kalbime huzur, gönlüme sabır ver. 🤲

en.title: Garden of Prayer
en.caption: My Lord, grant my heart peace and my soul patience. 🤲

tr.title: Tefekkür
tr.caption: Göklerin ve yerin yaratılışında düşünenler için ayetler vardır.

en.title: Reflection
en.caption: In the creation of the heavens and earth are signs for those who reflect.

tr.title: Şükür
tr.caption: Şükrederseniz elbette size daha çok veririm. (İbrahim, 7)

en.title: Gratitude
en.caption: If you are grateful, I will surely increase you. (Ibrahim, 7)

en.title: Prostration
en.caption: Prostrate and draw near to your Lord. (Al-Alaq, 19)

tr.title: Tevbe
tr.caption: Şüphesiz Allah, çokça tevbe edenleri sever. (Bakara, 222)

en.title: Repentance
en.caption: Indeed Allah loves those who turn to Him in repentance. (Al-Baqarah, 222)

tr.title: Zikir
tr.caption: Öyleyse beni anın, ben de sizi anayım. (Bakara, 152)

en.title: Remembrance
en.caption: So remember Me; I will remember you. (Al-Baqarah, 152)
